prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、自动化等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；食 品科学与工程因A+学科加持保持吸引力。本省2026年高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年约46.3万增加约15.5%，物理类考生估算约32.9万（较2025年28.5万增约15.5%），考生规模显 著扩大，竞争压力上升；南昌大学位于江西省南昌市，属中部地区，对四川考生而言属跨省就读；该校在四川招生规模适 中（约120–140人），无显著地域偏好信号。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 22248 → 21953 → 19797 → 52970 → 30107. In 2024, the ranking abnormally shifted significantly backward (possibly related to exam mode adjustments that year), and in 2025 it recovered to about 30107. Fluctuations have been large in recent two years, with a baseline of about 30107 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan Physics Category (former Science Category) was 144 in 2021, 140 in 2022, 131 in 2023, 127 in 2024, and 132 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 120, a decrease of 12 from 2025 (a reduction of about 9.1%), and the reduction in enrollment slots will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 74th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 70–78 range in recent years, placing it among mid-to-upper tier 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to Nanchang University men's volleyball team winning the championship in the 2025–2026 CUVA finals, enhancing the university's sports reputation and public attention. Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting increased attention for applications. No significant record of admission cut-off drops has been observed. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top nationally), which is the university's flagship. Medical specialties such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology, though not rated A-class, continue to have high application enthusiasm.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation maintain high social popularity. Food Science and Engineering retains appeal due to its A+ discipline status. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in the province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% from approximately 463,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 329,000 (up about 15.5% from 285,000 in 2025), indicating a significant expansion in examinee scale and rising competitive pressure. Nanchang University is located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province, in the central region, and for Sichuan examinees, it involves cross-province study. The university's enrollment scale in Sichuan is moderate (about 120–140 people), with no significant regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 30107, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 9.1%, a 15.5% increase in local Physics Category examinees, and a slightly positive reputation, the trend of intensified competition is clear, and the ranking is expected to move forward. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 28315, with a range of 27815–28815.
